title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0347
summary: Sayyed Sheru Sayyed Budan was arrested in 2021 after being found with a red bag containing five plastic packets of brown sugar weighing 500 grams, valued at ₹7.5 lakhs, during a police raid at Hotel Residency Park. He attempted to flee but was apprehended on the spot.
